title: Alternative Methods for Earning Credit: College Course Work/Dual Credit
description: Conroe ISD students have the opportunity to earn both high school and college credit at the same time by taking dual credit courses through an approved college or university. The policy outlines the eligibility requirements, enrollment process, and academic standards students must meet to participate in these programs. Families can use this information to understand how dual credit options may help students get a head start on college while still in high school.
